text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
City, happy b-day. ☆ So, you check your phone
yet?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean about today's takoyaki party?
Thanks for planning it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Gotta pull out all the stops for my gal's birthday! I
even called in a certified pro—this party 'bout to
be fire!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: A pro? Oh, is that why—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heya, pleased to be of service! Takoyaki pro,
Tamamo Cross here!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I got ya covered. To make sure nothing affects
your work, I'll make healthy takoyaki with tons of
veggies!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So, whaddya wanna fill 'em with? There's more
than just octopus! Something good for ya skin?
Tomato maybe?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's her birthday, so we can't be holding back!
She's got a sweet tooth, so how about chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there, you're an adventurous one too,
aren't ya? But hey, it's worth a try—done!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Is it just me, or are you two more excited about
this than me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh... Not that that's a bad thing.
